about-intro:
Web developer specializing in interactive 3D web experiences and real-time systems.
Builds scalable, high-performance applications that combine engaging visuals with seamless functionality using WebGL, TypeScript, and Node.js.
about-tagline: Full-stack developer focused on reliable products: modern professional websites, scalable APIs, and iOS/Android mobile apps built with current technologies and maintainable systems that help teams ship with confidence.
